session.user:
Run the tests in tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py and report the results. Do not fix any errors - just report what passes and what fails.
Command: pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py -v
session.assistant: I'll run the tests for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on land learn tests with verbose output
